wordplay_note: Beautiful birdsong — ironic name for a mortuary operator
card_description: Herbert Schoenheit von Vogelsang (meaning "Schoenheit = beauty; Vogelsang = birdsong") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Manager of the Beloved Brethren Moratorium where half-lifers are stored. Name note: Beautiful birdsong — ironic name for a mortuary operator. His florid name contrasts with his grim custodianship of the dead. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Manager of the Beloved Brethren Moratorium where half-lifers are stored
reference.significance: His florid name contrasts with his grim custodianship of the dead
